description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and runs npm install as a before_script for all jobs. Define a single stage named deploy and add a publish job that only runs on tag pushes or pipeline triggers. In the publish job execute the commands npm run build, then echo //registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=$NPM_TOKEN > .npmrc to set the npm authentication token, and finally npm publish to publish the package to the npm registry.
